title: aquilegia henryi
intro: Aquilegia henryi, also known as the Henry's columbine, is a flowering plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Aquilegia henryi are said to include the relief of rheumatism, fever reduction, and treatment of skin irritations, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer a range of health benefits when consumed.
